div.div:
score_transactions: UNIQUE action_completion_id; UNIQUE (user_id, idempotency_key); INDEX (user_id, created_at)
score_attempts: INDEX (user_id, created_at); INDEX (action_completion_id); INDEX (status, created_at)
outbox_events: INDEX (published_at, next_retry_at); INDEX (aggregate_type, aggregate_id)
user_scores: INDEX (score DESC) if database fallback leaderboard queries are required
